message:
fix(fcp-ratelimit): prevent Duration panics from adversarial inputs br-2ot4f

LeakyBucket::time_until_room panicked via Duration::from_secs_f64 when
leak_rate was extremely small (e.g. 1e-308), producing seconds exceeding
u64::MAX. parse_duration_string panicked on negative seconds like "-5s"
and overflowed on huge minutes/hours values. Added bounds checks and
regression tests for all three cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
